calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Roosevelt for Ellen Hugo.

Mr. Roosevelt stated that the estate had a number of stocks and shares that needed to be tracked down, that neither one of the 3 heirs were willing to take responsibility to handle the estate and that it was an enourmous project. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Lazatin.

Report Of Status Of Administration; Petition For Substitution Of Surety; Statement By Beneficiaries & Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Off Calendar

Report Of Status Of Administration; Petition For Substitution Of Surety; Statement By Beneficiaries & Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-10-2007 Continued To Mar-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Michael Roosevelt appearing for Ellen Hugo (Administrator). Mr. Roosevelt reported that they are making progress. There are two remaining problems: 1) one of the missing assets has been located in Delaware 2) income taxes have not been filed for 29 years. He had written to the IRS, but had not received a response. He is requesting a 6 month continuance. He will file a petition for Final Distribution with the income tax matters included. The court continued the matter to March 10, 2008. Counsel to prepare an order after todays hearing.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Janet Pond CSR#5292. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. Clerk: Rosie Noguera
